name: sleep disorder
title: best herbal teas for sleep disorder
description: Corydalis yanhusuo tea contains bioactive constituents such as tetrahydropalmatine and berberine, which have been found to have sedative and sleep-inducing properties that help to treat insomnia and other sleep disorders. The properties of this herbal tea, including its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, help to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
